message:
🐛 Fix tank calculator, hover tooltips, Amazon catalog, species buy links (#15)

- Tank calculator: size now scales with bioload (1"/gal rule), not just
  species minimum. Species picker filters by temperament to prevent
  mixing peaceful/semi-aggressive. "Shop tanks" links to actual tank
  products instead of broken search.
- Hover tooltips: repositioned from right (clipped) to above the row on
  both product pages and species care sheets.
- Amazon catalog: fixed 5 wrong images, 4 wrong ASINs, 3 broken image
  URLs across UV sterilizers, smart plugs, controllers, tanks, stands,
  and cameras.
- Species pages: added buy section with product cards and compatible
  tank-mate products. Shows all compatible species instead of only 6.
- Reviews: fixed product IDs to match actual amazon-{ASIN} handles.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
